titleStmt.title: SII 10.763: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 763. (A.R. No. 350 of 1909.) ON A SLAB NEAR THE TEMPLE TANK AT KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. Ś. 1[5]9[2]. (Virōdhikṛit)

summary.p: Records that Pemmasāni Kumāra Timmānāyanivāru planted a plantain tope- on the tank bund in Kuvvam which was under his government and dedicated it to Tervikkōlēśvarasvāmi, in the reign of Qutb Shāh of Gōlkoṇḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śālivāhasaśakābdaṁbbulu 1592
nēṭi virōdhikṛtusaṁvatsaraṁ māśi māsaṁ te gōla
koṁḍḍa kudupuśāhuvāri rājyaṁlōnu kuvvāna
pemmasāni kumāra timmānāyanivāru śēyiṁcci
na dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ mā yēlubaḍi AIna kuvvaṁlō
tirukuḷaṁgaṭṭanu timmappanāyani Araṭitōpu vē
yiṁstimi ganaka Ātōpu timmappanāyaniki
sukṛtaṁggā tervikkōlēśvarasvāmiki sama
¨rpiṁstimi yītōpunnu yītōpulō
galigina sakala vṛkṣādula phalādulunnu
sūryacaṁdrādulu galaṁttāgālamunnu
svāmikaiṁkkaryālaku naḍicēṭaṭṭugā kaṭṭa
ḍaśēśina śāsanamu yīdha¨rmānu ya
vararu vikhātaṁ cēśinā vāru kā
śilō gaṁggātīramaṁduna
gōhatya braṁhmahatya
cēśina pāpāna bōduru
Digital edition of SII 10.763 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
